description: Tests MCP's source suggestion behavior with various phrasings and edge cases. When user says 'gather' without specifying source, MCP should suggest based on available keys and context.

steps.description: User asks to gather but has no Apollo key configured
User asks to gather and HAS Apollo key
steps.user_prompt: Find fashion brands in Colombia, about 50 targets

steps.description: User mentions CSV without a file path
steps.user_prompt: I have a CSV file with my leads

steps.description: User provides a Google Doc (not Sheet) — MCP should handle gracefully
User provides both CSV and Sheet in one message
steps.user_prompt: I have /data/batch1.csv and also this sheet: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/abc123/edit

steps.description: Very vague request — MCP should ask for clarification
User provides domains directly in chat
steps.user_prompt: Check these domains: easystaff.io, inxydigital.com, getsally.io

scoring.pass_criteria: MCP correctly identifies the source type AND takes appropriate action (suggest, ask, or proceed) in at least 6/7 scenarios
scoring.god_criteria: MCP handles all 7 correctly with helpful explanations
